title: Summarizing Research Papers
scenario: Given a research paper of approximately 1000 words, write a summary of no more than 200 words that captures the main findings, methodology, and conclusions.
constraints: Must include an abstract and introduction
Summary should be no more than 200 words

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the summary meets the word count and structural requirements.
Verify that the summary accurately captures the main findings of the research paper.
Check if the summary accurately describes the methodology used in the research paper.
Ensure the summary accurately reflects the conclusions drawn in the research paper.
